QUESTION:
What will the output of the following code be?

```python
class Animal:
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name

class Dog(Animal):
    @classmethod
    def create(cls, name):
        return cls(name)

fido = Dog.create('Fido')
print(fido.name)
```

Options:
  A. Dog
  B. Fido
  C. None
  D. Error
